prestazioni: 1ZZ-FED 1.8L naturally aspirated engine swap to a 2ZZ-GE 1.8L with a custom HKS GT-SS turbo kit (GT2835 ball-bearing turbo, HKS 264° camshafts, and Tomei 1.5mm head gasket for 11.5:1 compression), paired with a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU for precise fuel and ignition mapping, targeting 280hp at 8,500 RPM with a 9,000 RPM redline

Full custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system by Fujitsubo Giken (equal-length 4-2-1 headers, 200-cell catalytic converter, and a single 3.5-inch titanium muffler with a 12-degree angle cut for optimal scavenging), paired with a Tomei Type-S 4-1 downpipe for reduced backpressure

Custom-built 6-speed manual transmission swap using a C60 6-speed from a Lotus Elise, reinforced with a PPG close-ratio gear set (2.97, 2.15, 1.57, 1.22, 1.00, 0.85), OS Giken twin-plate clutch, and a Cusco 1.5-way LSD with 45% lockup for aggressive power delivery
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (front fenders, rear quarter panels, and rear bumper) with custom carbon fiber overfenders to accommodate 9.5J ET30 front and 10.5J ET25 rear Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (17x9.5 +30 front, 17x10.5 +25 rear) wrapped in 225/40R17 and 255/35R17 Yokohama Advan A052 tires

Custom front lip and rear diffuser by Veilside Fortune 03, paired with a Seibon carbon fiber hood (with integrated NACA ducts for intercooler cooling) and a custom rear wing by J's Racing (3D-printed aluminum core, 1,200mm span, 300mm chord, and 50mm height for 150kg downforce at 160km/h)

Full interior overhaul with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (fixed-back, FIA-approved), Takata Drift II 4-point harnesses, a custom MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm diameter, suede-wrapped), and a full custom roll cage by AutoPower (10-point, TIG-welded, chromoly steel, with integrated harness bars and door bars)
